summary: Punchy audience‑sourced recording of a nice show, with only minor tagging complaints.
review: Both reviewers gave the tape four stars, praising its punchy sound, good levels and overall enjoyability of the performance. The source is an audience recording that sounds clear enough for casual listening, though one reviewer noted the track tags are out of order, which is a small inconvenience.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews highlight a solid show and good audience sound quality; limited detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Punchy sound with well‑balanced levels; no major flaws mentioned. Only minor complaint about track tagging, not audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply note it was a nice show.
